label: Basic booking - no surprises
persona: You are a homeowner calling to book a routine service appointment. You give your real-sounding name (Sarah Mitchell), your address (look it up from the business's service area - pick a city listed for that business, street like '442 Elm Street'), and your phone (5125557410). You're available 'sometime next week, weekday afternoons work best'. You answer the SMS-consent question yes when asked. You're polite and a little chatty but not pushy.
opening_line: Hi, I think I need to get something looked at - is now a good time?

checks: Agent gathered name, callback phone, address, and reason for the call before booking.
Agent read the full SMS-consent disclosure (all 7 required elements) before book_appointment.
Agent confirmed the chosen slot back to the caller.
Agent did NOT invent prices or services.
